parameters.query: SELECT system_prompt, user_prompt_template FROM prompts WHERE name = '{{ $json.quiz_type }}' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO content_queue (title, platform, pillar, content_type, generated_content, quiz_answer, content_format, comment_scheduled_at, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.pillar }}', '{{ $json.content_type }}', '{{ $json.generated_content }}', '{{ $json.quiz_answer }}'::jsonb, 'quiz', NOW() + INTERVAL '{{ $json.comment_delay_hours }} hours', '{{ $json.status }}') RETURNING id
